Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The main abnormality is a significantly elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Globulin is reported as low, but the unit appears inconsistent; please verify. All other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, liver enzymes, and lipids, are within or close to normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function.
